rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §31.029 governs bilingual instructional materials purchasing and is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district shall purchase with the district's instructional materials and technology allotment or otherwise acquire instructional materials for use in bilingual education classes.
_note: Rule text contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values; no direct or indirect conflict identified.
